raw_consumer_statement:
A charge was put on this credit card on XX/XX/XXXX. I cancelled the charge on XX/XX/XXXX in writing certified mail. I called Barclays on XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX to complain about this charge, they told me I had to go through the company who charged the card and work with them. I did that. The company who charged it stopped responding in XX/XX/XXXX and never refunded my money. I contacted an attorney, the XXXX  and CFPB about the charge and nobody could help me. They said the company didn't respond, so there was no was to get the money back. 
I send a dispute in writing with all of the information to Barclays two times, CFPB and the XXXX, and the Federal Trade Commission. I called Barclays to get help with this multiple times. Still, no help. 
I had a payment plan set up the whole time with Barclays for XXXX  XXXX, they changed it to XXXX  XXXX with no notice. The card was supposed to be XXXX interest for XXXX XXXX, they started charging interest with no notice. 
Barclays has refused to help me with this charge, and has added insult to injury with a charge that was cancelled. 
Today, I cancelled all payments and put a stop payment on them at my bank and cancelled the card. I have never used this card for anything, the only balance is the original charge that should have been refunded within 30 days. The balance is {$10000.00}. 
There should be no balance on this card. There should be no interest accruing on this card. The payments should have been exactly {$120.00}, no more.
